cases.name: available observation cannot have null value
cases.expected_error: null value requires an explicit unavailable evidence state

cases.name: number observation cannot carry string value
cases.expected_error: value does not match value_type number

cases.name: derived fact requires lineage
cases.expected_error: derived or modeled fact requires derivation

cases.name: raw fact cannot masquerade as a derivation
cases.expected_error: non-derived fact must have null derivation

cases.name: unknown evidence state is rejected
independent assessment stays in independent plane
cases.expected_error: independent_assessment requires the independent evidence plane

cases.name: uncertainty confidence is bounded
base-year comparable target requires sourced baseline
cases.expected_error: comparable base-year target requires target year

cases.name: BAU comparable target requires published scenario
intensity comparable target requires denominator
fixed-level comparable target requires level
trajectory comparable target requires pathway facts
cases.expected_error: comparable trajectory target requires pathway facts

cases.name: peaking comparable target requires peak year
sectoral target cannot claim economy-wide comparability
cases.expected_error: sectoral target cannot be economy-wide comparable

cases.name: qualitative target requires native statement
net-zero comparable target requires full details
target year range is bounded
reviewer must differ from extractor
headline cannot be available when ambition is not assessed
cases.expected_error: headline must be withheld when ambition or delivery is not assessed

cases.name: duplicate canonical ID is rejected
unreviewed assessment overlays cannot become release eligible
